topic: where do I plug in a new validator-side Prometheus metric?
summary: Validator metrics are registered with the helpers in linera-base/src/prometheus_util.rs (register_int_counter_vec / register_histogram_vec) and exposed via the /metrics endpoint started by linera-metrics/src/monitoring_server.rs. To add a metric for an existing subsystem, register a LazyLock/once-cell static next to the others in that subsystem's module (e.g. linera-views/src/metrics.rs for storage), then increment/observe it at the call site. Dashboards live in docker/dashboards/linera-general.json and scrape config in docker/prometheus.yml / docker/alloy-config.river.

architecture.excerpt: Metrics: ~310 register_* call sites. Registration helpers centralized in linera-base/src/prometheus_util.rs. Per-subsystem statics (e.g. linera-views/src/metrics.rs defines LOAD_VIEW_LATENCY). Exposed by MonitoringServer on :21100 in prod (docker), scraped by Prometheus/Alloy.

code_spans.why: Canonical helper to register a histogram; mirror an existing call.
Example of a per-subsystem metric static to copy.
Where the /metrics endpoint is served; no change needed, just confirms exposure.

changes.title: linera-chain: widen outbox metric ceilings and add outbox_counters_size
changes.relevance: Recent worked example of adding a validator-side metric + dashboard ceiling.

tests.run_cmd: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up && curl localhost:21100/metrics | grep <metric_name>

pitfalls.text: New histograms need sensible bucket ceilings or dashboards clip at the top bucket (see #6440). Set buckets near observed p99.
High-cardinality labels (chain_id, application_id) multiply series and can OOM Prometheus. Keep labels bounded.

next_steps: Read linera-base/src/prometheus_util.rs and copy the closest register_* helper.
Add the static near related metrics in the owning subsystem module.
Observe/increment at the call site; avoid unbounded label values.
Add a panel + bucket ceiling to docker/dashboards/linera-general.json mirroring #6440.

confidence.rationale: Pack verified against HEAD; PR #6440 is a live worked example; metric helper paths confirmed by grep (310 register_* sites).

warnings.message: Exact bucket values are subsystem-specific; read the neighboring metric before choosing buckets.
